text:
35 PRs merged today. The Greenhouse got a larger creative toolbox: new image studios, writing tools, games, learning apps, build things, and some delightful nonsense.

AI Night now has a proper front door for 16 July in Berlin. New app-use quests can earn Pollen. Under the soil, deployment checks got sturdier too. Software remains a garden with more plumbing than expected. 🌱🐝

Details, apps, and the repo: pollinations.ai

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #buildinpublic #indiedev #generativeai #aiart #opensourceprojects #berlintech #hackerspace
